lines.speaker: Pious Pete
lines.text: [Brother/Sister] [player name] - welcome to the Realm of Memories.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you do before you came here?

lines.speaker: Pious Pete
lines.text: I worked in a chapel dedicated to our lord, Saradomin. My task was to light the chapel candles, but I couldn't reach them myself and I kept getting dazzled by the light whenever I tried.

lines.speaker: Pious Pete
lines.text: I'd call adventurers from across the world, summoning them to my chapel to do the task for me. I needed them to light the tall candles, but not the short ones.

lines.speaker: Pious Pete
lines.text: However, adventurers got confused, and thought they should light the short candles as well as the tall candles, so I made them try again. And again.

lines.speaker: Pious Pete
lines.text: Eventually my chapel was closed down. They said I'd trapped adventurers there for too long. All I wanted was for them to light the tall candles without lighting the short candles!

lines.speaker: Pious Pete
lines.text: Anyway, now I live here, and remember the good old days. It is nice to meet you, [player name].

lines.speaker: Pious Pete
lines.text: Yes, it is a common name. I also know of Party Pete, Parroty Pete, Postie Pete, Pirate Pete, Petrified Pete and 'Picarron' Pete. The Makeover Mage has used the name Pete too.

lines.speaker: Pious Pete
lines.text: Although we are not related, the shared bond of that name can be a comfort in dark times.
